title: FEP-8fcf: Follower Collection Synchronization
description:
Implement follower sync per FEP-8fcf.

**Spec:** https://codeberg.org/fediverse/fep/src/branch/main/fep/8fcf/fep-8fcf.md

**Requirements:**
- Generate SHA256 XOR digest of follower URIs for Collection-Synchronization header
- Include header in responses to Follow/Undo activities
- Parse incoming Collection-Synchronization headers
- On digest mismatch, fetch remote followers collection and reconcile
- Handle adds/removes to sync follower state

**Why:** Detects and corrects follower drift between instances without manual intervention.
